cases.name: eval_table_sort_with_redis_data
argv:
redis.call('RPUSH', KEYS[1], '3', '1', '2')
local vals = redis.call('LRANGE', KEYS[1], 0, -1)
local nums = {}
for i, v in ipairs(vals) do nums[i] = tonumber(v) end
table.sort(nums)
return nums[1]
